description: Avo is an analytics tracking-plan and data-governance platform for defining events, properties, metrics, and branches, then generating implementation code and monitoring analytics quality. It helps product, data, and engineering teams keep analytics definitions consistent and publish or import tracking-plan data across tools.
summary: Avo exposes a REST Public API at `api.avo.app`, a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.avo.app/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `avo` CLI.
